fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier for the offer script

fields.name: name
fields.description: Name of the offer script, e.g., 'Premium Credit Card Upgrade'

fields.name: department_from
fields.description: Department that originated the offer script, e.g., 'Marketing'

fields.name: department_to
fields.description: Department that will receive the offer script, e.g., 'Customer Services'

fields.name: created_date
fields.description: Date when the offer script was created

fields.name: effective_date
fields.description: Date when the offer script becomes effective

fields.name: status
fields.description: Current status of the offer script, e.g., 'active' or 'pending'

fields.name: target_segment
fields.description: Target audience for the offer script, e.g., 'Gold Account Holders'

fields.name: duration_seconds
fields.description: Length of the script in seconds

fields.name: content
fields.description: Script content, e.g., a sales pitch or marketing message

fields.name: call_to_action
fields.description: Call to action for the script, e.g., 'Would you like me to proceed with the application?'

fields.name: success_metric
fields.description: Metric used to measure the success of the script, e.g., 'application_completion'
